main.description: List the records in a permissioned repo, inlining record values by default. Set excludeValues for a metadata-only listing of paths and CIDs. Requires a covering OAuth scope or a space credential; implemented by a repo host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the repo's author.

collection.description: Restrict the listing to a single record collection. When omitted, records from every collection in the repo are returned.

limit.description: The number of records to return.

excludeValues.description: When true, omit record values and return only paths and CIDs.

uri.description: Permissioned record URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}/{authorDid}/{collection}/{rkey}. Not a standard at-uri.

value.description: The record value. Omitted when excludeValues is set.
